examples: They were in a state of sleepy content after supper.

definitions.text: That which contents or satisfies; that which if attained would make one happy.
To give contentment or satisfaction to; to satisfy; to make happy.
examples: You can't have any more. You'll have to content yourself with what you already have.

definitions.text: To satisfy the expectations of; to pay; to requite.
Subject matter; semantic information (or a portion or body thereof); that which is contained in writing, speech, video, etc.
examples: Although eloquently delivered, the content of the speech was objectionable.
You can look up the chapter on special relativity in the table of contents.
